1. Request message is lost.
The client sends a request, but the request message dose not reac thhe server
2. Reply message is lost
The server processes the request and sends a reply, but the reply mesage dose not reach the client
3. Server crashes
The server fails befor or after processing the client request, so the client cannot know the exact state of the request
